auth.title: Login
auth.subtitle: Sign in to place orders faster, save products and track your purchases.

errors.endpointNotFound: Auth endpoint not found at {url}. Check NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL.
errors.network: Cannot reach auth API ({url}). Check frontend API base URL and backend availability.
errors.unknown: Login failed due to an unexpected client error.

accountAccess.title: Account access
accountAccess.description: If you already have an account, sign in with your email and password. Use the quick actions below for a new account or access recovery.

forgot.title: Forgot password?
forgot.description: Recover access to your account and continue working with orders without registering again.

register.title: Need an account?
register.description: Create an SVOM account to save products, vehicles and purchase history.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your account details and sign-in security.
profile.authRequired: You need to log in to open profile settings.

errors.passwordLengthExact: Password must contain at least 8 characters.

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Create an SVOM account: your email will be used for login and profile details will be saved for orders.

messages.created: Account created. Profile details have been saved.

errors.passwordLength: Password must contain at least 8 characters.

forgotPassword.title: Password recovery
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your account email. If it is registered, we will send a link to create a new password.

messages.sent: If the email is registered, a recovery link has been sent.

errors.failed: Failed to send password recovery link.

resetPassword.title: New password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter a new password for the account. After saving, log in with the new password.

messages.updated: Password updated. Now log in with the new password.

errors.failed: Failed to update password. The link may have expired.
